name: Taking care of your friend's plants.
description:
"Lilligant are popular among celebrities. Nonetheless, it's hard to let the flowers on their heads bloom, because if they get a lack of attention or care, the flower will wither. This shows that Lilligant are extremely delicate Pokémon that require lots of pampering. [...]"

Your friend Erika, gym leader of Kanto, has enough knowledge to take care of not just one of them, but two.

But are you as qualified as her?

She called you today, saying that she had an important appointment to attend to, and she needs help with a pair of these beauties. You accepted to take care of them without being aware of the endless instructions she'd bombard you with. The most adequate temperature and moisture, keeping them watered but not too damp, allowing them to stand under the sunlight but not for too long... It only makes sense the most beautiful pokemon need the most exhaustive care. Erika is beautiful as well, and that's why you wouldn't want to let her down (cause she may let you clap ykyk)

And these two plants resemble their master very well. Not only in beauty, but also in shape.

You may not be a gardener, but surely you can work out some proper way to take care of them.

Didn't really know if people would prefer the normal form or the Hisuian form, so I made both.

Having them be named simply "Lilligant" and "Hisuian Lilligant" would be confusing and boring, so I gave them names. The normal one is "Lili" and the hisuian is "Asuka", as a reference to the Tekken characters that I felt to be kinda similar to them.

Lilligant is also a bot I wanted to make when I started here, but other characters got my attention first until I kinda forgot about her. I should really keep making pokemon bots, but after the change in rules it may be a little more complicated than before.

About 3 people asked for Lilligant last time, which I didn't really expect with other characters such as Kim or Rebecca in the collage. Now I'll get to the rest.

35 left.

oh btw i edited the original pic so hisui lilligant would have big boobs too. this is a thing i really like to do as you see.
